# CWE-838: Inappropriate Encoding for Output Context (mitigated)
lang: go
file: CWE-838-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

type Notice struct {
	Title string
	Body  string
}

// Safe: response encoding matches the declared UTF-8 JSON content type.
func PublishNotice(c *gin.Context, db *gorm.DB) {
	id := c.Param("id")
	var notice Notice
	if err := db.First(&notice, id).Error; err != nil {
		c.Status(http.StatusNotFound)
		return
	}
	c.Header("Content-Type", "application/json; charset=utf-8")
	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, notice)
}
